steps.t: Lore-master Rúni is located in Bazanmanar. Mother Amma has asked you to speak to Lore-master Rúni.
Mother Amma is in Bazanmanar, in the north-east Clovengap. You should tell Mother Amma what you found in the ruins of Frósthel.
Lore-master Rúni is in Bazanmanar, in the north-east Clovengap. Mother Amma has asked you to see what progress Rúni has made.
